race.comment: SPACETIME LEGEND (8) rewarded for his consistency last start with a dominant Maiden win in C1 class over 2200m at Newcastle in the heavy (9) going. Will relish the rain affected track and can win again. DAMASCUS GATE (6) stretches out to this trip for the first time after shouldering the 58kg with a sound on-pace sixth over 1500m at this track. Gets in light with the claim and worth noting four of his wins have come on heavy tracks. Each way. AUSSIE NATION (1) in career best form and doesn't have to improve much to win this. Nailed late in the testing conditions when second over 2100m at Hawkesbury in BM64 grade. Holds a forward position and has genuine top-three claims. SCOTTISH PEARL (2) near her top for this and brings the right form here. Finished a narrow fourth to Thebudgiesmugla over 2400m in BM78 grade at Rosehill last November. Respect. CALIFORNIA GRASS (3) strips fitter today after struggling in town last start. Value contender.
